fields.description:
# Refresh exact-pinned dev tooling: zizmor + ruff

Bump two exact `==` pins in `pyproject.toml`'s `[dev]` extra to current, un-yanked releases.

## Why
- **zizmor 1.27.0 is YANKED** for GHSA-f42p-wjw5-97qh (Moderate, CWE-532): 1.27.0 prints
  GitHub tokens (`GH_TOKEN`/`GITHUB_TOKEN`/`ZIZMOR_GITHUB_TOKEN`) to stderr under `-v`/debug
  logging. Only 1.27.0 is affected; the fix is 1.28.0. rebar's `make lint` invokes `zizmor
  release.yml` with no verbose flag, so there is no live exposure, but pinning exactly to a
  security-yanked release is fragile (a stricter resolver / pruned cache can fail installs).
- **ruff 0.15.19 -> 0.15.22**: routine patch refresh to stay current on the format/lint pin
  (exact-pinned for local<->CI parity). No yank/security; grouped here as a low-risk sibling.

## Plan
1. `pyproject.toml`: change the pin line `zizmor==1.27.0` -> `zizmor==1.28.0`.
2. `pyproject.toml`: change the pin line `ruff==0.15.19` -> `ruff==0.15.22`.
3. Reinstall the dev extra so the worktree venv has the new tools.
4. Run `make lint`; if the newer ruff reformats anything, apply `ruff format` and include the
   diff so CI format-check stays green. Run `make typecheck`.
5. One commit, `rebar-ticket` trailer + DCO sign-off; push to Gerrit; land after
   `LLM-Review +1` AND `Verified +1`.

Note: the pin comment block above zizmor does not mention a specific version string, so no
comment edit is required — only the pin line itself changes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `pyproject.toml` pins `zizmor==1.28.0` — verify: `grep -c 'zizmor==1.28.0' pyproject.toml` returns 1 and `grep -c 'zizmor==1.27.0' pyproject.toml` returns 0.
- [ ] `pyproject.toml` pins `ruff==0.15.22` — verify: `grep -c 'ruff==0.15.22' pyproject.toml` returns 1 and `grep -c 'ruff==0.15.19' pyproject.toml` returns 0.
- [ ] `make lint` exits 0 in the worktree venv (ruff check + format-check + zizmor + actionlint).
- [ ] `make typecheck` exits 0 in the worktree venv.
- [ ] `git diff --name-only origin/main` lists only `pyproject.toml` (plus any file ruff-format rewrote), no unrelated files.
- [ ] [operator-attested] The change is merged to `main` via Gerrit with `LLM-Review +1` and `Verified +1` (evidence: the merged change's Gerrit vote record; out-of-session).
